The cumulative mass (mg cm−2) was calculated based on this concentration. The flux (in mg cm−2 h−1) of the active drug – ibuprofen and its derivatives through the skin into acceptor fluid was determined as the slope of the plot of cumulative mass in the acceptor fluid versus time.

title: Hyaluronic acid-ibuprofen conjugation: a novel ototherapeutic approach protecting inner ear cells from inflammation-mediated damage.

anchor_evidence.snippet: unknown
Normalized cytokine release in LPS-stressed macrophages treated with HACs, or the respective unconjugated anti-inﬂammatory drugs.
synthesized a series of covalently attached HA-anti-inﬂammatory conjugates (HAC) using several anti-inﬂammatory drugs; hydrocortisone (HC), prednisolone (PS), and ibuprofen (IBU).

notes: The paper primarily discusses ibuprofen-HA conjugates and their effects on cochlear cell viability and inflammatory markers.
